working_on.sprint: Sprint 5 — CRM Phase 06A+B done. Phase 06C next.
working_on.description: Phase 06A: CRM 3-column layout (ConversationList, ChatWindow, CustomerPanel). Phase 06B: Data binding — conversation-store.ts (Zustand), chat.service.ts types aligned with BE, real API calls, loading/error states. Input disabled until Phase 06C (manual override).

commits_since_last_save.message: chore(brain): save-brain Sprint 4 — Knowledge UI + Playground

pending_tasks: Phase 06C: Wire input → POST human-reply, enable staff messaging
Phase 06D: Facebook Messenger Channel integration (FE side)
Customer detail API (phone, email, tags — needs BE endpoint)
recent_changes: Phase 06A: CRM 3-column layout — ConversationList, ChatWindow, CustomerPanel, loading skeleton
Phase 06B: Data binding — conversation-store.ts, chat.service.ts types match BE Prisma schema exactly
Phase 06B: ConversationList uses API data (agent name, message count, status badges)
Phase 06B: ChatWindow supports 5 roles (CUSTOMER, ASSISTANT, HUMAN_AGENT, SYSTEM, TOOL), input disabled
Phase 06B: CustomerPanel shows limited data (name + conversation details), resolve with loading state
Layout: /dashboard/chat uses full-height overflow-hidden, other routes keep padded wrapper
Removed mock-data.ts (no longer needed with real API)

uncommitted_summary.summary: 9 files: CRM UI layout + data binding + types + store + layout change
